de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model

Interface ISymbolicElement

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    ISymbolicAssociation, ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer, ISymbolicEquivalenceClass, ISymbolicLayout, ISymbolicObject, ISymbolicState, ISymbolicValue
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractElement, AbstractSymbolicAssociationValueContainer, SymbolicAssociation, SymbolicEquivalenceClass, SymbolicLayout, SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessAssociationValueContainer, SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessElement, SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessAssociation, SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessEquivalenceClass, SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessLayout, SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessObject, SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessState, SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessValue, SymbolicObject, SymbolicState, SymbolicValue

    public interface ISymbolicElement
    Defines the basic methods and properties each element in an symbolic object model has to have.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IModelSettings getSettings()
      Returns the IModelSettings to use.
